message:
refactor(tests): Extract constants and simplify test assertions

net_udp.rs:
- Extract NUM_DATAGRAMS and DATAGRAM_SIZE as module-level constants
  (NET_UDP_NUM_DATAGRAMS, NET_UDP_DATAGRAM_SIZE) to avoid magic numbers
  in test bodies and satisfy clippy::unreadable_literal

sync_conformance.rs:
- Simplify assertion logic by removing redundant intermediate bindings

cancel_attribution.rs:
- Minor formatting adjustments for consistency

repro_epoch_barrier_race.rs:
- Remove unused import

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
